title: codereview pass 1: coap_status.c map_count uint16_t + bounds in cbor_put_*_header for CCP-17
description: Verified uint16_t map_count calculations, added >UINT8_MAX check in both header funcs to set overflow preventing bad CBOR. No P0/P1. Scope limited to coap_status.c per instructions. Zephyr build pending.
